Adolescent period (teenage) is spread almost over a decade. It is characterized by rapid increase in height and weight, hormonal changes, sexual maturation and wide swings in emotion. Adolescent growth spurt starts at about 10-12 years in girls and two years later in boys. The annual peak rates for height and weight are 9-10 cm and 8-10 kg. Development of critical bone mass is essential during this period as this forms the ground for maintaining mineral integrity of the bone in later life.
